title: Phase 2 - Enhancements
description: Nice-to-haves: engagement features, API, notifications, skills coach

title: Gamification & engagement features
description: Progress indicators, skill charts (radar/heatmap), badges/streaks, team trends, skill endorsements, 'last updated X months ago' nudges

title: Skills Coach (LLM-powered)
description: Ask about career goals, suggest skills based on profile, recommend colleagues with target skills for mentoring, personalised learning paths

title: Admin notifications for pending skills
description: Notify admins when a skill is suggested and needs approval

title: API endpoints (Sanctum)
description: REST API for users and skills to integrate with other applications

title: Skills Matrix Report
description: Admin-only page showing a visual overview of team skills. Should allow filtering by skills or users to answer questions like 'Who knows Linux?' or 'What can these people do?'. Related to Excel export functionality.

title: Skills matrix table/grid view
description: Create the core matrix view - users as rows, skills as columns, levels shown in cells (colour-coded by level)

title: Filter by skills
description: Allow admins to filter the matrix to show only specific skills or skill categories (e.g., 'show me everyone with Linux/DevOps skills')

title: Filter by users
description: Allow admins to filter the matrix to show only specific users (e.g., 'what can Rita, Sue and Bob do?')

title: Excel export of matrix
description: Export the current matrix view (with any active filters) to Excel using SimpleSpout. This replaces/implements skillsdb-uyt.5

title: Phase 1 - Core MVP
description: Core functionality: user skills management, admin skills management, data model

title: Data model (models, migrations, factories, seeder)
description: DONE: SkillLevel enum, SkillCategory, Skill, skill_user pivot, User updates
close_reason: Completed: SkillLevel enum, SkillCategory, Skill, skill_user pivot, User model updates, factories, TestDataSeeder, tests

title: HomePage and SkillsEditor components
description: Full-page HomePage (thin wrapper) + SkillsEditor component with card grid, radio pills, search/filter, suggest new skill
close_reason: Completed: HomePage, SkillsEditor with search/filter, skill levels, suggest skill modal with flyout and success toast

title: Admin skills management
description: List all skills, create, edit, delete, approve pending suggestions
close_reason: Implemented admin skills management with CRUD, approve pending, search, and requester display

title: Admin user skills management
description: View all users, manage skills for any user (for pre-filling new starters)
close_reason: Admin user skills management implemented with list view, click-through to edit, toggle defaults, and None selection fix

title: Excel export
description: Admin can download skills data as Excel using SimpleSpout
close_reason: Superseded by skillsdb-74m.4 (Excel export as part of Skills Matrix Report)
